aboutStory.title: Dashboard design, data modeling, and automation should support the same business goal.

aboutCards.title: Decision-first dashboards
aboutCards.copy: I design reports around the business questions people actually need answered, not around visuals that just make a dashboard look crowded.

aboutCards.title: Maintainable models
aboutCards.copy: Star-schema thinking, measure-driven logic, and DAX optimization help me keep reports maintainable, responsive, and easier to scale.

aboutCards.title: Automation where it helps
aboutCards.copy: Power BI gets stronger when it is paired with better data movement and workflow design, so I also use Python and Microsoft automation tools where they make sense.

projects.title: Open Sales Order & Pipeline Analytics
projects.problem: Limited visibility into open sales orders obscures true pipeline health.
projects.solution: Delivers a real-time, consolidated view of open orders with trend insights.
projects.impact: Enables clearer pipeline tracking and faster, data-driven sales decisions.
projects.shortSummary: A real-time open-order reporting experience built to clarify pipeline value, pricing, trends, and sales ownership.
projects.details:
This Open Sales Order analytics solution provides a real-time, consolidated view of open sales performance across customers, regions, and sales ownership. It enables clear visibility into order value, volume, pricing, and status, while supporting year-over-year trend analysis to identify demand patterns and seasonality.

The solution demonstrates strong capability in business-aligned KPI definition, dynamic, filter-driven analysis, and insight-focused reporting, supporting faster and more informed decision-making for sales and leadership teams.

projects.title: Performance Leaderboard
projects.problem: Relying on intuition to assess performance caused leaders to overlook top talent.
projects.solution: Automated rankings and trend insights to recognize high performers instantly.
projects.impact: Data-driven performance reviews without manual reporting.
projects.shortSummary: A leaderboard-style dashboard that turns sales performance into clearer rankings, contribution views, and trend analysis.
projects.details:
This dashboard delivers a holistic view of sales performance and revenue trends across time, regions, products, and ownership. It enables stakeholders to track sales growth, contribution patterns, and performance drivers through interactive comparisons and drill-down analysis.

The solution highlights the ability to structure complex sales data into meaningful KPIs, enable multi-dimensional analysis, and present insights in a way that supports strategic planning, performance monitoring, and informed business decisions.

projects.title: Time-Intelligent Sales Benchmarking
projects.problem: Current-month performance lacks historical context for meaningful evaluation.
projects.solution: Compares current sales, profit, and volume against rolling historical averages.
projects.impact: Enables clearer trend detection and more confident performance decisions.
projects.shortSummary: Rolling 3-, 6-, 12-, and 24-month comparisons for trend detection and contextual sales benchmarking.
projects.details:
This dashboard enables comparative performance analysis by evaluating current month sales, profit, and volume against rolling 3-, 6-, 12-, and 24-month averages. This approach helps identify short-term momentum, long-term trends, and performance deviations with clarity.

The solution demonstrates the ability to deliver time-intelligent analytics, support trend benchmarking, and provide context-driven insights that improve sales monitoring, forecasting accuracy, and data-driven decision-making.

projects.title: Period-Based Sales Performance Comparison
projects.problem: Sales performance is difficult to interpret without clear comparison across time periods.
projects.solution: Displays previous, current, and next period sales metrics dynamically based on the selected period.
projects.impact: Enables quick period-over-period analysis and better short-term planning decisions.
projects.shortSummary: A dynamic comparison model built for previous, current, and next period analysis in a single reporting flow.
projects.details:
This dashboard provides a dynamic, period-driven sales comparison view by displaying previous, current, and next period values across all key sales metrics based on a user-selected timeframe. It allows users to seamlessly evaluate performance shifts, identify momentum changes, and anticipate near-term outcomes.

The solution demonstrates strong use of time intelligence and dynamic calculations, enabling consistent period-over-period analysis that improves sales monitoring, planning accuracy, and data-driven decision-making.

projects.title: Budget vs Actuals Analytics Dashboard
projects.problem: Budget and actual data were spread across multiple systems, making reconciliation slow and inconsistent.
projects.solution: A unified Power BI dashboard combining Budget, SPR, Open Sales, and Inventory data for accurate variance analysis.
projects.impact: Enabled faster financial insights, reduced manual reconciliation, and improved budget control.
projects.shortSummary: A unified finance dashboard that standardizes source data and makes variance analysis easier to trust and act on.
projects.details: The Budget vs Actuals Dashboard consolidates budgeted values and actual performance from SPR, Open Sales, and Inventory into a single Power BI model. It standardizes business unit mappings, resolves source-level inconsistencies, and provides clear variance analysis across time periods. The dashboard supports dynamic comparisons, KPI tracking, and drill-down analysis, helping finance and business stakeholders monitor performance, identify gaps, and support informed decision-making.

projects.title: Hospital Risk Analysis Dashboard
projects.problem: Healthcare risk data was fragmented, making it difficult to identify high-risk patients and operational issues.
projects.solution: An interactive Power BI dashboard that consolidates clinical and operational risk indicators into a single view.
projects.impact: Improved risk visibility, faster decision-making, and better prioritization of patient care and resources.
projects.shortSummary: A healthcare risk dashboard that brings scattered indicators into a single, drillable operational view.
projects.details: The Hospital Risk Analysis Dashboard provides a unified view of patient risk, operational metrics, and key indicators using Power BI. It enables users to monitor high-risk cases, analyze trends, and drill down into contributing factors across departments and time periods. Designed for healthcare analysts and management, the dashboard supports proactive risk identification and data-driven decision-making.

projects.title: Healthcare Performance & Insights Dashboard
projects.problem: Healthcare data was spread across systems, limiting visibility into performance and operational issues.
projects.solution: A centralized Power BI dashboard combining key healthcare metrics into one interactive view.
projects.impact: Improved visibility, faster insights, and better operational decision-making.
projects.shortSummary: A centralized view for clinical activity and operational trends across healthcare reporting workflows.
projects.details: The Healthcare Performance & Insights Dashboard delivers a consolidated view of clinical activity, operational performance, and key trends using Power BI. It allows users to analyze metrics across time, departments, and categories with interactive filters and drill-downs. Built to support analysts and leadership, the dashboard helps monitor performance, identify improvement areas, and support strategic planning.

projects.title: Hospital Quality Analysis Dashboard
projects.problem: Quality performance metrics were scattered across reports, limiting visibility into care outcomes and service quality.
projects.solution: A centralized Power BI dashboard to track and analyze hospital quality indicators in one place.
projects.impact: Enhanced quality monitoring, quicker insights, and better support for continuous improvement initiatives.
projects.shortSummary: Quality-focused reporting for hospital teams that need a clearer view of service and outcome indicators.
projects.details: The Hospital Quality Analysis Dashboard delivers a consolidated view of healthcare quality metrics using Power BI. It helps stakeholders monitor performance trends, compare key indicators across time and departments, and identify areas requiring improvement. The dashboard is designed for healthcare management and analysts to support data-driven quality assessments and reporting.

projects.title: Flat File Comparison Tool
projects.problem: Manual validation of large Excel and CSV files is time-consuming and error-prone.
projects.solution: A browser-based Python Streamlit application for reliable Source vs Target flat-file comparison.
projects.impact: Enables fast, accurate validation of 100k+ row datasets with audit-ready Excel outputs.
projects.shortSummary: A validation tool built for reconciliation, migration checks, and structured mismatch diagnostics at scale.
projects.details:
The Flat File Comparison Tool is a web-hosted data comparison application built using Python and Streamlit, designed to compare large Excel and CSV files directly from the browser without any local installation, setup, or technical configuration. It is optimized for business users, data analysts, auditors, and engineers who require reliable file-level and data-level comparison with clear diagnostics and structured outputs.

The tool supports Excel and CSV files and allows users to upload Source and Target files, dynamically select sheets, configure header row positions, and choose single or multiple business key columns. It includes normalization features such as case-insensitive column matching, case-insensitive data comparison, optional whitespace trimming, and handling of dates, numeric formats, and null values.

Comparison results include match percentage calculation, row-level classification, schema difference detection, and value-level mismatch identification. Intelligent diagnostics provide root-cause analysis, ranked mismatch impact, sample value inspection, and automated recommendations to improve match accuracy.

After execution, the tool generates a business-friendly Excel report containing an executive summary, column comparison, row comparison, unique value analysis, and summary statistics. All files are processed securely in-memory per session, with no permanent storage or external system integration.

experience.summary: Current work blends Power BI delivery with reporting automation, Microsoft workflow tooling, and performance-focused analytics engineering.
highlights: Delivered 12+ Power BI dashboards across Finance, Sales, Logistics, and Operations.
Built end-to-end Oracle to SharePoint to Power BI data pipelines using Python and automation.
Improved reporting performance through model and refresh optimization.
Developed automation and AI solutions with Copilot Studio, Logic Apps, and AI Builder.
Reduced dependency on premium BI licensing through Excel-based reporting alternatives where appropriate.

experience.summary: Internship work focused on reporting, visualization, and data modeling foundations across Power BI, Tableau, Excel, and SQL.
highlights: Generated reports and dashboards using Power BI Desktop, Tableau, and Advanced Excel.
Constructed tabular and multidimensional data models.
Created visualizations from live and extracted data sources.
Processed and shaped data using Excel, MySQL, and extraction techniques.
Completed two analytics projects during the internship period.

toolGroups.title: Reporting approach

process.title: Frame the reporting problem
process.text: I start with the business questions, the users, the current reporting pain points, and the data sources behind the work.

process.title: Shape the model and logic
process.text: Then I design a cleaner structure for measures, dimensions, calculations, and refresh logic before the visuals take over the conversation.

process.title: Design for clarity
process.text: I build dashboard views that make KPIs, exceptions, comparisons, and trends easier to understand and use in real decisions.

process.title: Refine and automate
process.text: Finally, I improve the delivery flow with automation, performance tuning, and follow-up changes so the reporting system stays useful after handoff.
